nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 中华人民共和国
nodes.summary: 中华人民共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联285种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、花脸鸭、黄腹角雉等285种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 青藏高原
nodes.summary: 青藏高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括青藏沙鸻、鵰鴞、高山兀鹫等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 青海省
nodes.summary: 青海省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括四川雉鹑、白马鸡、雪鸽等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 青藏喜鹊
nodes.summary: 青藏喜鹊（Black-rumped magpie，学名 Pica bottanensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 不丹
nodes.summary: 不丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、红胸山鹧鸪、红胸角雉等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 西藏自治区
nodes.summary: 西藏自治区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括青藏喜鹊、大斑星鸦、藏䴓等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Kalimpong district
nodes.summary: Kalimpong district is a district in the state of West Bengal, India.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: left|thumb|Nest building in Bumthang, Bhutan The black-rumped magpie is found at high altitudes, with its entire range in or on the margins of the Tibetan Plateau, from central Bhutan to Qinghai and western Sichuan in west-central China, to eastern Tibet. It has been reported from Sikkim, with three specimens reportedly collected there by Louis Mandelli in 1873, but their exact collection location is unknown and may have been in Tibet.{{cite journal |last1=Prŷs-Jones |first1=Robert P

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |last3=Rahut |first3=Biswapriya |journal=Indian Birds |volume=14 |pages=71–73 |title=The status of the Black-rumped Magpie Pica (pica) bottanensis in India |url=https://indianbirds.in/pdfs/IB_14_3_PrysJones_Rasmussen_BlackrumpedMagpie.pdf |access-date=2026-02-18}} One in Kalimpong district, West Bengal, on 9 May 2023 was the first verified Indian record. It is found in farmland and other semi-open habitat like farming districts, parks or gardens, and usually close to human habitation, at least in Bhutan. They are uncommon in the highest altitudes, but have been observed as high as , with nests at
